sub_mechanisms: M_1: encode (param, gradient) as phase-space point
M_2: define a Lagrangian action functional on iterate trajectories
M_3: solve for the action-minimizing curve over the budget
M_4: project minimizing curve to LR schedule
stripped_llm_application: Treat the training iterate (theta_t, g_t) as a phase-space point and define a Lagrangian action functional over iterate trajectories. The learning-rate schedule is the projection of the action-minimizing curve over the training budget; the schedule selects step-sizes that minimize cumulative action.
novelty_claim_stripped: Existing schedules (cosine, WSD, generative latent ODE, road-less-scheduled) are heuristic or budget-fitted. None use a Lagrangian action-minimization principle in iterate phase space.
